commits: d25c55d: fix(12-S-fix-1): findings 1+2 — populate V05_VERBS, harden Rust scanner
e77265c: fix(12-S-fix-1): finding 3 — wire STRICT=1 + apt-get update
findings_addressed: 1 [high]: V05_VERBS populated with 32 verbs inventoried from 39ee271^:python/fathomdb/_engine.py + _admin.py (verbs removed/redesigned in 0.6.0, no equivalent name). Rust matcher tightened to `pub fn` to suppress private-helper false positives. Per-language v05_verb_reroute fixtures + sentinel test (len(V05_VERBS) > 0) added.

2 [medium]: scan_rust() strips /* */, /** */, and /*! */ block comments via in_block_comment state machine that handles tails after */ on the same line. New rust/clean/block_comment_safe.rs proves doc-comment names don't false-fire; rust/block-comment-real/ proves real code is still flagged when a block comment exists elsewhere. Crate-root #![allow(deprecated)] rule isolated to rust/crate-root/lib.rs; legacy_admin.rs no longer conflates two rules.

3 [high]: scripts/agent-verify.sh now invokes `STRICT=1 bash scripts/agent-security.sh` between typecheck and test. scripts/bootstrap.sh runs `sudo apt-get update -qq` before `apt-get install strace` (best-effort so a flaky mirror does not block all dev tooling). agent-security.sh header documents the wiring.
v05_verbs_source: git show 39ee271^:python/fathomdb/_engine.py + 39ee271^:python/fathomdb/_admin.py (cross-checked against current src/python and src/rust to drop names still in 0.6.0)
agent_verify_local_aarch64_status: fail (rc=1) — strace absent on this dev host; STRICT=1 path correctly promotes the AC-036/AC-037 BLOCKERs to a hard failure
agent_verify_ci_expected: pass — bootstrap.sh apt-installs strace before agent-verify runs
agent_verify_result: fail (expected on aarch64 local; CI expected pass). Tail: `agent-security: 0 violation(s), 2 blocker(s)` — AC-036 + AC-037 BLOCKER on missing strace. Other gates (AC-038, AC-050a x3, AC-050c) PASS.
test_ast_scan_result: pass — 12 OK lines including V05_VERBS sentinel, per-language verb-reroute, crate-root isolation, block-comment safe + real
next_step_for_orchestrator: promote to 0.6.0-rewrite; respawn codex reviewer for clean PASS
